overview: A production-grade multi-language code editor in the browser. Write and run code in 16 languages with Monaco editor, dark glassmorphism UI, real-time output, code saving, and shareable links.
features: Monaco editor with syntax highlighting and dark theme
Three-column IDE layout: language sidebar, editor, output console
Guest mode with instant editor access; sign in to save code
Per-language code saving with auto-load on language switch
Font size and tab size controls
Dark glassmorphism theme with neon accents
